name: Black Bean Chili Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 can 14.5 oz. Diced Tomatoes with Garlic (Del Monte)
1/4 cup traditional Salsa or Picante Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the soup, tomatoes, corn, onions, and salsa.
2. Bring to boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium and cook for 3 minutes.
4. Serve with a dollop of sour cream.
